message:
style(supervision): use Duration::from_mins(1) in supervision tests and doc examples

Continuation of the from_secs(60) → from_mins(1) readability pass,
covering the supervision module's RestartConfig tests, doc examples,
and BudgetRefusal assertions (20 occurrences).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
